node.title: Salesforce SMTS | Razorpay SSE | Uber SDE 2 | Bengaluru

topic.title: Salesforce SMTS | Razorpay SSE | Uber SDE 2 | Bengaluru

post.content:
**Previous company**: Mid size MNC
**Previous Compensation**: 30 LPA (Fixed including PF + Gratuity) with no stocks and performance bonus
**YOE** : 4 Years

**Below are some of the offers:**

**Razor Pay SSE (Backend)**
Fixed : 35 LPA
Stocks : 25 Lakhs (vested over 4 years, vesting will start after a year and then on a monthly basis)
First year net takeaway: 41.25 LPA
Note:
1. 2 days work from office
2. PF + Gratuity is included in the fixed component

**Uber SDE2 (Backend)**
Fixed : 45 LPA
Joining Bonus: 5LPA (only first year)
Performance bonus : 6.8 LPA (could go down to 0.5x and up to 2x)
Stocks : 68000 USD = 56.76 Lakhs (vested over 4 years and vesting will start from first month itself)
First year net takeaway: ~71 LPA
Note: 
1. 2 days work from office (I can try to push a bit more for the fixed component but not sure if they will do it)
2. PF + Gratuity is on top of the fixed component

**Salesforce SMTS (Backend)**
Fixed : 55 LPA
Performance bonus : 8.8 LPA (could go up to 1.5x - 2x)
Stocks : 65000 USD = 54.26 Lakhs (vested over 4 years and vesting will after a year and then on a quaterly basis)
First year net takeaway: ~77.3 LPA
Note:
1. 3 days work from office
2. Gratuity is on top of the fixed component

**Other companies in pipeline**: Google for SWE III but they don't have the budget to match Uber and Salesforce offer

Could the community please help me decide which offer I should go with?

[Edit] Interview Experience: https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/5817444/salesforce-smts-razorpay-sse-uber-sde-2-bengaluru-interview-experience/2640931

Congratulation! As you mentioned all 3 roles are Backend, so how much they are expecting us to know the backend techstack?\nlike in depth or is there any special round for that or just a normal question they asked?\nPlease describe.
Congrats! Does Salesforce hire SMTS at 4 years? What was the required YOE listed in the JD?
congrats on your offer , please share your interview experiences .\n
Where did you finally join? Please let us know.
What was your interview prep timeline?
Congratulations buddy!! Can you please share the timelines of uber offer? like debrief -> verbal offer -> offer letter? thank you
Congrats ! After how many days did you got the offer letter for salesforce SMTS ?

did you apply at the career site directly or applied via referral or did the recruiter reach out to you? Also, did they offer the initial salaries based on your current salary or as per their pay bands?
could you also share the questions you faced and the prep resources you used ?

Congrats on those amazing offers! \uD83C\uDF89 If you\'re looking for fast growth and stock value, Uber seems like a great choice with strong comp and early vesting. \uD83D\uDE80 But if you\'re after stability and higher fixed pay, Salesforce is tempting with its bonuses. It really comes down to where you see yourself thriving long-term. Curious to know what you\'re leaning towards!
Congratulations. How long did uber take to intimate you of selection after the last interview?
Hey Congrats! Did you had Uber offer before Salesforce?

Google can beat those offers in terms of TC. Go through the compensation mentioned in leetcode discuss.  Salesforce would be chill and things at Uber would be team dependent but expect an Amazon/Meta like culture at Uber.
move it to the comp section
